form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 8th (Sr2) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 4th-7.4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $34. Showed ability the race before when she came from midfield and won by 5.5 m (Fr7) at Riverina Paceway (2:45.90) beating Im Harvey Specter in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $19 at the bell was 4th-7.8. Will be right in the thick of things.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr3) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 30 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $61. Two runs back 3rd (Fr2) over 1760m after showing early speed at Junee beaten 13 m by Ronzel Sonny (2:12.90) in NR 40 to 40 on March 17 at $41. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr1) over 1710m at Goulburn beaten 25 m by Rudimentary (2:04.00) in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $151. Before that was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr3) over 1770m after being wide early at Canberra beaten 40 m by Pyekakariki (2:11.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 15 at $31. Others make more appeal.

Two runs back ran on from midfield and won by a nose (Fr5) at Young (2:09.80) beating Tenacity Red in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $19 at the bell was 3rd-2. Sure to be there at the business end.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 8th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee, beaten 35 m by Ronzel Sonny (2:12.90) in NR 40 to 40 on March 17 at $61. This looks a far sterner test.
